summary: Implemented Phase 2 faction-aware rules catalog. Added `rts-rules::faction` with the `steel_vanguard` default catalog and an empty fixture faction, routed sim build/train/research/gather/production-anchor/supply checks through faction-aware APIs, added a Rust catalog dump plus JS parity checker, documented the catalog/shared-global-id rule, and marked `plans/faction/phase-2.md` done.
verification: cargo check --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-rules -p rts-sim: passed
cargo test --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-rules faction: passed
cargo test --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-rules economy: passed
cargo run --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-archcheck -- check-sim-architecture: passed
cargo fmt/rustfmt check was not used as a gate because crate-level rustfmt reports unrelated pre-existing drift in files outside this phase; touched Rust files were formatted directly.
cargo clippy --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-sim -- -D warnings: passed
gameplay_impact: No intended player-facing gameplay change. The current faction keeps the same build menu order, train lists, tech requirements, upgrades, costs, and supply behavior; commands are now rejected by faction catalog legality before future factions can access out-of-faction globals.
next_executor_notes: Phase 3 should call `rules::faction::catalog_for(...)` / `catalog_for_or_default(...)` plus `economy::*_for_faction` entry points for lifecycle validation. The exact client mirror gate is `node scripts/check-faction-catalog-parity.mjs`. Remaining compatibility helpers are the non-faction `rules::economy::{trainable_units, build_requirement_met, train_requirement_met}` APIs, which preserve default-faction behavior for older callers/tests. Steel/Oil/Supply costs remain attached to global unit/building defs and are gated by faction catalog availability, not faction-scoped resource payloads.
manual_test_notes: Run a normal local match and verify the current tech tree still behaves normally: Worker build menu order, Barracks units, Training Centre unlocks, R&D upgrades, Vehicle Works units, Gun Works units, rally points, and supply reservation.
